name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Will you join the Canary Club?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Every day, I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a cage. And to me, it's much more than an accessory. Miners used to bring canaries into the mines in order to check for dangerous levels of gas. If the canary died, they knew to get out of the mine. Back then, there were no formal protections for workers. So they banded together to fight for the right to collectively bargain. Years ago, I went to a Workers' Memorial Day rally in Lorain, Ohio, and a steelworker from Local 1104 gave me the canary pin. I've worn it ever since. It reminds me not just of the workers' rights movement, but of every hardworking man and woman in America, the families they support, and how important it is for me and for this grassroots team to keep fighting for each of those families. The canary pin is an important symbol for me -- and to this campaign. So today, we're announcing the Team Sherrod Canary Club. Our organization runs on one $26 average online contribution at a time. If you [**_match that by giving $26 today, you'll become a member of the Team Sherrod Canary Club._** ](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffaf7/4462dc26/522974f0/2007d99a/2343181118/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180607nd?refcode=sbe180607nd_m&amount=26")We'll even send you a free bumper sticker as a thank you. | [](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffaf7/4462dc26/522974f0/2007d99a/2343181118/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180607nd?refcode=sbe180607nd_m&amount=26")
---
These next five months will not be easy. But as long as we face them together, we will come out ahead in November -- and we'll be able to continue fighting for hardworking families in Ohio and across the country.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffaf7/4462dc26/522974f0/2007d999/2343181118/VEsF/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: 🛡️ Protecting those who protect us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/V5Z-y0OQixx0ZC1R5PrURPKELYJrb04o8cf6oMtKPcQ=/Io8fc47kKm3ipd9eYNqu6dYsR_sG-43dpcywdKDIUEw=) Friends and Neighbors -- Every day, our police officers and other brave first responders put their lives on the line -- to protect ours. They are often the most unsung heroes in our community - giving their all but asking so little in return. I am both honored and humbled that our campaign recently received the endorsement of the Police Benevolent Association (PBA). With this and last year's historic decision by the International Association of Fire Fighters (IAFF) to move their general election endorsement process forward to endorse our campaign - **it is clear that we are the first responders ' first choice in the race for CFO. ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/V5Z-y0OQixx0ZC1R5PrURPKELYJrb04o8cf6oMtKPcQ=/x7iw__X-3ou0O_Sj94E9Y2ANleeGs6nCROLieLgie2M=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Stand with our First Responders. I will also act as an important check and balance in the cabinet, making sure that your tax dollars are being spent the way you were told they had been spent and advocating for a new, more innovative economy for all Floridians. But I have to get to Tallahassee first. **And I can 't get there without your help**. [**Can you contribute $3 or more today to stand with our first responders - protecting the best interests of those who protect us?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/V5Z-y0OQixx0ZC1R5PrURPKELYJrb04o8cf6oMtKPcQ=/x7iw__X-3ou0O_Sj94E9Y2ANleeGs6nCROLieLgie2M=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: This weekend...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
It's time to act, Peter. Just a few days are left before the Tuesday, June 12th Democratic Primary. It's the day we've been focused on since this campaign started, and if you're like me, you want to make the most of the time we have left before Tuesday.

That's why we're planning a **Weekend of Action**. We're knocking on doors around the 7th District. We're making phone calls to ensure every voter who needs a ride to the polls gets one. Democracy works when we all participate, and Team Spanberger -- over 1,300 volunteers strong now! -- is working hard to get out the vote... and win.

Regardless of your weekend plans, **you can help** us make these next few days a roaring success with a donation:

* $20 buys a bag of coffee for the office -- phonebanking fuel!
* $15 buys a six-pack of clipboards -- can't canvass without 'em!
* $5 buys a box of pens -- you can never have too many!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zNkytSOcUxSgE3WjTF6vfKAHm_ROivZLncdvgiuSJwo=/okb3eObCawvVEyZUNrpniJncXKV-FxJHZ_8lUCTCDWs=?refcode=06_08_18)

Caring and generous people like you have made this campaign what it is, Peter. There's no way I can list out all of the acts of dedication and determination I've seen in these last few months, but I can honor them by working tirelessly before Tuesday to make those efforts truly count.

I hope you'll join me.

As always, thank you for everything you're doing, Peter.

-Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zNkytSOcUxSgE3WjTF6vfKAHm_ROivZLncdvgiuSJwo=/w4HabAjWsdDNAaZF5UR6IDgqzQbjuPcWrQOEWppeDCo=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/zNkytSOcUxSgE3WjTF6vfKAHm_ROivZLncdvgiuSJwo=/EUCSK6LHtb4XTJZvIuXSJ21Zzi1320yriUqFZf6lB5o=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---

PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: The White House
subject: A raw, unfiltered look at the ‘Crisis Next Door’
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6c839d80aec00576eaacdf93ef82c857c022e60952a1cdfc29a8c6b58acb117ae70fd7558ac7fdba56e8067bca11cbf98bee5825eb03c324) The White House • June 8, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump travels to Quebec, Canada, to participate in the 44th G-7 Summit with American allies. |
---
|

## A raw, unfiltered look at the 'Crisis Next Door'
**"I thought I had it under control**. I didn't know it would be this addictive," Kyle said. "I didn't know how far I'd go to get more."
**Kyle is a young man from Dallas, Texas**. His story is one of four videos unveiled yesterday by the Trump Administration as part of a joint public awareness campaign on opioid addiction. The ads were produced in partnership with the Office of National Drug Control Policy, the Ad Council, and the Truth Initiative. The goal is to show young adults how destructive an opioid addiction can become.
**Each video features a true story of different young adults that go to extreme measures** to get access to a prescription. Highly addictive drugs can have this effect, particularly on young people. According to the Truth Initiative, an opioid addiction can take hold in as little as five days.
**These ads will be the first of many from the White House**. "There are many, many facets to the opioid crisis, all requiring varied and unique solutions," said Counselor to the President Kellyanne Conway, who is leading the White House opioids effort.
[See the 30-second ads and learn more about the campaign.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6c839d80aec005760176f8f4305d5d5ef8a16496c6c500ac61f3bb799cdbcaa532ee48d49a3128bb468ca38f74dd61695e7928e08542f4e0)
**Go deeper** : [President Trump is taking action to stop youth opioid abuse ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6c839d80aec00576ec231303d11768c2940da6252af977f71728eda4985704529d2f4efa96458fc7ed28ef0a40df7a234aa47c66cf1c954d)
---
|

## President Trump prepares to meet Kim Jong Un
**Tomorrow, President Trump travels to Singapore** to prepare for his meeting early next week with North Korean leader Kim Jong Un. The President's trip comes following last week's White House visit from North Korean Vice Chairman Kim Yong Chol, who delivered a letter from Kim to President Trump.
**"The United States and North Korea have been holding direct talks** in preparation for a summit, and North Korea has confirmed to us its willingness to denuclearize," Secretary of State Mike Pompeo told reporters yesterday. "The fact that our two leaders are coming to the table shows that the two sides are very serious."
**America has taken a new approach to diplomacy** under President Trump, embracing the Reagan model of "peace through strength" while acknowledging the repeated failures of appeasement. "The diplomatic model we've used to date is different from past efforts. Our efforts give us hope that we can find real success where past efforts have fallen short," Secretary Pompeo said.
[Watch Secretary Pompeo's update on the North Korea summit.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6c839d80aec005764bcb828ac90160c21ef2e7adcb98c0deb60bf1c701572040773fed611c54a46f2f40311fafc91ced3fd5e8ec22ae9253)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump and Prime Minister Shinzo Abe of Japan** | June 8, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6c839d80aec005762234a4bbbb956cdb1214901eca2f30ecfcde805c2a37b1c841c34309288ed15b3f0e4e32d911b28791836eff7d8f4af2) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6c839d80aec005761019d61d0ceb8146c3518f059541bf2ccd0d5ed450cdee9547f9627b50d27c2953768a4f85fe38771cac8f6c2a45894b) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d475268ec61b9ba71cf6d4895a3558ce3b3d9c11a0677453d7cce43ac4bd32d2e712e3071e4cf619b8123a46aa0adf7b64f128f0dfd5c7d002)
---

body:
According to [AL.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1364089/7454290/-1133456834?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDA0ZDE4ZS0yNjZiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-D_CDP0cGwRgHLazfHzKqSSDeIEmeKmpXaQ_eedq_U=), Mo Brooks has almost $700,000 in his campaign war chest, thanks to his failed Senate run last year. name: Phil Bredesen 2018
subject: Cut The Carp!

name: Xochitl Hinojosa
subject: Add your name if you agree health care is a right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Pre-existing condition protections are at risk. Add your name to stand against Trump's latest attack.
---
Last night, the Trump administration asked a federal judge to dismantle the provision that protects people with pre-existing conditions under Obamacare.

This shocking and morally reprehensible move is yet another attempt to dismantle critical health coverage for those who need it most. This kind of health care sabotage is unprecedented, and we won't let them get away with it.

**Democrats believe health care is a right, not a privilege. Add your name if you agree and stand against the Trump administration in their latest effort to destroy Obamacare.**

[ I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dea/4067b0a/5b9ff6d58/7fb8e463/1886597709/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/protect-health-care-now?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180608_xh_nd&source=em_20180608_xh_nd")
No one should be discriminated against just because they're sick or require specific care. That's why President Obama and Democrats enacted historic protections for people with pre-existing conditions and prevented insurance companies from charging people higher rates because of their health status.

The American people overwhelmingly support these provisions -- it's why millions of us came together last year to defend our health care when this GOP-led Congress tried to dismantle the Affordable Care Act.

If Donald Trump and Republicans get their way, millions of Americans will be at risk of losing their health coverage. The people who will suffer most are those who depend on comprehensive, quality care more than anyone else.

Like most Americans, Democrats believe health care is a right for all, not a privilege for the wealthy few -- and we don't believe that an insurer should be able to discriminate against you because of a pre-existing condition. There has never been a more important time to show where we stand.

**[Add your name right now against the Trump administration's latest attack on Obamacare and say you support health care for all.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dea/4067b0a/5b9ff6d58/7fb8e460/1886597709/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/protect-health-care-now?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+right+now+against+the+Trum&utm_campaign=em_20180608_xh_nd&source=em_20180608_xh_nd")**

Together we will fight back by voting Republicans out of office for their senseless attacks on families all across this country. Thank you for being a part of that effort.

Thanks,

Xochitl

Xochitl Hinojosa
Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. Just so you know how cynical these people are, the Trump administration asked the court to repeal the pre-existing health care protection, but to _wait until after the election_. They know this is a hugely unpopular move -- they're just hoping they can sneak it by the American people. **[Add your name now to show you won't let them.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dea/4067b0a/5b9ff6d58/7fb8e461/1886597709/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/protect-health-care-now?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+now+to+show+you+wont+let+t&utm_campaign=em_20180608_xh_nd&source=em_20180608_xh_nd")**

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dea/4067b0a/5b9ff6d58/7fb8e46e/1886597709/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180608_xh_nd&source=em_20180608_xh_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dea/4067b0a/5b9ff6d58/7fb8e46f/1886597709/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180608_xh_nd&source=em_20180608_xh_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dea/4067b0a/5b9ff6d58/7fb8e46c/1886597709/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180608_xh_nd&source=em_20180608_xh_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dea/4067b0a/5b9ff6d58/7fb8e46d/1886597709/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180608_xh_nd&source=em_20180608_xh_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Prison Reform – We Need Your Voice
body:
Peter,
I want to make sure you know about a good piece of legislation that passed the U.S. House on May 23 with overwhelming bipartisan support (a vote of 360 to 59) and is now waiting to be voted on in the Senate.
It’s very important [Senators hear from Christians on this important issue.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FcyeS10T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180608p2a01&n=1)
The legislation, The First Step Act of 2018, would provide a new process in the federal prison-intake system to assess individual needs and expand access to federal prison programs, including faith-based programs and resources, in an effort to reduce the rate of which prisoners re-offend, after serving their time, and return to prison.
Some of the new federal prison programs this bill would provide include employment training, parenting training, and drug abuse treatment.
Many Christians have championed the cause of prison reform over the years and some met at the White House recently regarding this important issue.
The current rate of federal inmates returning to prison after they are released is extremely high at nearly half of all prisoners serving time in prison again after they have been released.
The First Step Bill would seek to break this terrible pattern by teaching prisoners to be law-abiding citizens and members of society. The bill would provide them with the necessary tools, information, and treatment to overcome past mistakes and live meaningful and productive lives.
While more may be needed to also address sentencing reform, My Faith Votes believes this bill finds important common ground on the principles of human dignity and grace.
It’s critical we urge our Senators to vote in favor of the “First Step Act of 2018.”
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FcyeS10T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180608p2a01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180608p2a01&n=3)

clean_body: Peter, I want to make sure you know about a good piece of legislation that passed the U.S. House on May 23 with overwhelming bipartisan support (a vote of 360 to 59) and is now waiting to be voted on in the Senate. It’s very important The legislation, The First Step Act of 2018, would provide a new process in the federal prison-intake system to assess individual needs and expand access to federal prison programs, including faith-based programs and resources, in an effort to reduce the rate of which prisoners re-offend, after serving their time, and return to prison. Some of the new federal prison programs this bill would provide include employment training, parenting training, and drug abuse treatment. Many Christians have championed the cause of prison reform over the years and some met at the White House recently regarding this important issue. The current rate of federal inmates returning to prison after they are released is extremely high at nearly half of all prisoners serving time in prison again after they have been released. The First Step Bill would seek to break this terrible pattern by teaching prisoners to be law-abiding citizens and members of society. The bill would provide them with the necessary tools, information, and treatment to overcome past mistakes and live meaningful and productive lives. While more may be needed to also address sentencing reform, My Faith Votes believes this bill finds important common ground on the principles of human dignity and grace. It’s critical we urge our Senators to vote in favor of the “First Step Act of 2018.” United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

Friends,

Tuesday night's Primary Election victory was an important step for our campaign and for New Jersey. Our strong performance is a direct result of all that you have done to support Bob in this election. Thank you!

While our campaign has momentum, the Bob Menendez campaign is flailing. Menendez’s calculus—that Democrats would blindly vote for him, despite his being indicted for bribery and breaking federal law, just because he was a Democrat—was wrong. In Tuesday night’s Democratic Primary, a virtually unknown challenger garnered nearly 40% of the vote against Menendez, a two-term incumbent. That’s unheard of. Even Democrats don’t want to vote for Bob Menendez.

Tuesday's Primary results prove what we always knew—this is a competitive race, our strategy is working, and our message is resonating. The most recent public poll shows Bob Hugin just 4-points behind Menendez. (_Uh-oh. New poll suggests Menendez's re-election not a sure thing._ [NJ.com](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=f6172f5d30944818ad3ec3cc6c0fbd0f&_e=hlE0BF9l9fJyM42Xw-txRyoccz9qKcodoWXXmGQrgUYEKurMR_kr78lo5twcgknYVqSaVlN3KGczAXPdy1SQDOjk7ruGsem6e7HB3O-I2Uvjg32AArwXjzwNzQ_Lok6bBchPhJEdc-NvYXIR-eIygeDGO1vRPr041u1K-0mUQ-_Q7TIiC74NRkw9Hpt7x-fyNVi6v4Mo_X1290oITOxPds4MoWiSkXODlD5Vd2rzQIdagTrCcI1DyFMoL5yfE25XKUyMKxNV-RB28X4tONbVrelG_JXOyMHFvvX1pP4E33S6MLbgnA2saa67rddZzsYsOyO-Rlgstoh3CqGQk0vy89VnmBpiRmRzsx5W9mpC-ztWj00nhxnrtsqinbHUzbnBUlxCMhxcdWV5SeCxsNhRlA1Wlamex4jXXJd-n7qhpUybMWFiHteDd4yesQF2eiMFvsm52qqyfPwr_rwm2QxlaGcYaqVnyYqHqBpjKxPd4tt6pE79TGepsVXXqq52lpgPGEdSGwJbIkabawK12fC9a8vQPOjp7vLkR9MyBvpN0f8BtKVBLExSEChXMLDhpXszgRPmbBtoqsKOxSwyupXJkqnU1GL4-lzyPNneCFGKlQKERTTwr9hv8RwHYnMrWq-nMADN7l27ilYO20benNQHSmn_RU6SVDr7Cu3wDQUQSFugOfXkMPAsJcOcGrGbEUyhw1G81qx9pMHSriIzxUUwQt7DQlzuQmK8wkAA3EqSt7WViqu8NvlqLI5AEU2ygASeg3C4WFJDeoDXYtD3GbhESdraGVH1fTYsD5zm9U3q9ReeZsZ3eeXI04zPUTe2ChYPIkfwXIvVC6RZTgyXmRhrBIoydhAO3NDF1UKooxDxZsKaoGFA5AGIADMzwBjyg_dQNdDBwC9UjowPOt1gsAU-xMZWGAr23R4hBmogMAHkVjFQSoYkHFkh7hiALJqoFRFuyKi44f1jdhnFE_9Sr-VHOFdD_kwcjHd1zbJ1FgWa7S-W-j4w741QT_KjAf6W0-G6mr71UJZkke4XpXyCRH4nTtyEqnHShXFYhOIljhFtW2rlZ1ZfiCp_4wuNCBki1I51fPeP7tSldgqtvTnysVaLdWszD6IyZKM0Jatv9eHjCL4%3D))

name: Team Kasich
subject: Read - Global Security Suffers When Trump Snubs America's Trading Allies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
While the G-7 summit is underway in Canada, we wanted to share
with you Gov. Kasich's latest column.

Peter - while the G-7 summit is
underway in Canada, we wanted to share with you Gov. Kasich's
latest column.
When you have the time, we
encourage you to read this and share it with your contacts. Thank
you!
READ - Global Security Suffers
When Trump Snubs America's Trading Allies

Full Text: Global Security
Suffers When Trump Snubs America's Trading Allies

Small and medium-sized businesses
- including family farms - have long been engines of prosperity
and economic growth for communities across North America. Sadly,
this engine is at risk of losing steam in the wake of President
Donald Trump's decision to levy tariffs on steel and aluminum
imports to the United States. This ill-advised edict has already
ignited a trade war with countries across the globe - many who
are steadfast U.S. allies, including our neighbours Canada and
Mexico among them.

As governor of one of the largest
of the 50 states - one that is so clearly dependent on the free
flow of trade - I have good reason for concern. The new Ohio we
are building includes many industries and emerging technologies
that will only become stronger with trade. And agriculture, my
state's largest and oldest industry, is equally dependent on
trade. Our plan for Ohio's future is centred on getting our
products and technologies, our crops and raw materials to world
markets - and then importing those things we can't make or grow
on our own.

That model has served us well,
and nowhere has it been more mutually rewarding than in Ohio's
trade relationship with Canada. Last year, Ohio exported nearly
US$19-billion to Canada - fully 38 per cent of our total world
exports - and we imported US$12.2-billion from Canada in return.

As long as trading countries
abide by the same rules, free and open trade produces
competition, which leads to greater innovation and ultimately
improves quality of life on both sides of the trade transaction.
It encourages each state or country to focus on those products
and services it produces best, and then to continue improving its
offerings and discovering new ones to serve markets worldwide.

Even more important, trade is
essential to building lasting geopolitical relationships that
bind us together and promote peace. Former U.S. president Ronald
Reagan said it best: "The freer the flow of world trade, the
stronger the tides of human progress and peace among nations."

Recently, Canada and 10 other
countries from the Pacific Rim region agreed to sign the
Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific
Partnership (CPTPP). Missing from that agreement was the United
States, as the Trump administration chose to emphasize its
"America First" mindset and withdraw from an earlier agreement,
the Trans-Pacific Partnership (TPP). Instead of looking to the
United States for support, partner countries spurned by the
President's action now look to creating free-flowing trade
relationships without us. Even worse, the emerging countries
among them may now be easier prey for China, Russia and other
repressive regimes seeking to expand their influence. Those who
do not hold our two countries' shared goals and best interests at
heart will be free to shape the future rules, regulations and
norms by which global business is conducted. All this will cause
serious harm to the future economic security of the United
States, Canada and our allies around the world.

As a former member of the U.S.
Congress who served for 18 years on the House Armed Services
Committee, I remain convinced that trade is essential to global
security: building alliances, helping keep the peace and
encouraging democratic progress around the globe. And because our
global framework of shared security and prosperity rests on the
keystone of free, rules-based international trade, the United
States must work with partner nations to modernize agreements
such as the North American free-trade agreement (NAFTA), not
jettison it. We need to be more connected, not less. We need a
strengthened trade agenda to reflect the realities of the modern
economy - digital, flexible, agile and connected.

Any serious discussion of global
security must address head-on the interconnected nature of our
economies and the future of trade. These questions are too
important - and there is now too much at risk. The United States
must repair its damaged partnership with worldwide allies. And
the first, most important place to start that repair is with our
friend and neighbours to the north and south.

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich for America

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

You were added on July 18, 2015 and you can learn more about how you
were added by clicking here: http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWJ6he8GNV

If you would like to send this message to some of your friends,
you can click here to do so: http://email.sermodigital.com/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=11086331&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=933663ca3f741b59c37ac8fc9a0afde3&schema=echo3

If you believe you received this message in error or no longer
wish to receive emails from Kasich for America, simply click to
unsubscribe. http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWJ6he8GNV

name: Bob Casey
subject: I'm mad as hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
The Trump administration is coming after the Affordable Care Act's protections for people with pre-existing conditions, team, and it's time for us to draw a hard line.

We **__will not__** go back to the dark days before the ACA, when insurance companies could refuse to cover people with diabetes, asthma, even cancer survivors.

**I'm mad as hell, and I'm ready to fight this with both fists up.**

Ever since this news broke late last night, I've been thinking about a favorite talking point of my opponent's. Congressman Lou Barletta loves to say that if he had been in the Senate last year, the ACA would already be repealed. You know what? _He's right._ The GOP needed one more vote to turn back all of the progress we've made toward making quality, affordable health care a reality for every American, and I flat-out refuse to go backwards on this.

**Here's my promise to you, you can count on it: I am going to do everything in my power to fight for folks with pre-existing conditions and protect the Affordable Care Act.** We still have work to do to bring health care costs down, but the ACA is a whole lot better than what we had before. This administration's determination to sabotage it is flat-out cruel.

Thanks for being on my side in this fight.

Bob

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

name: Environmental Watch (via Team Lipinski)
subject: Help us grade Scott Pruitt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter,

Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Administrator Scott
Pruitt is actively sabotaging America’s environmental
protections, and he’s blatantly abusing taxpayer money while
doing it.

His personal scandals are piling up at an alarming rate, but
now he’s trying to dismantle the EPA’s ability to use unbiased
scientific research. He wants Big Oil to tell the EPA what’s fact
and what’s fiction. He's dismantling the rules that keep our air
and water clean and safe.

Final exam season is wrapping up and we need 1,000 supporters
to GRADE SCOTT PRUITT by midnight. Use the buttons below to have
your grade instantly recorded →

Peter’s GRADE for Scott Pruitt:

A

He wants Big Oil to tell the EPA what’s fact and what’s fiction. He's dismantling the rules that keep our air and water clean and safe. Final exam season is wrapping up and we need 1,000 supporters to GRADE SCOTT PRUITT by midnight. name: Team Beto
subject: The polls are moving in the right direction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Let's check in, team:
**January 2018 PPP poll**
Ted Cruz: 45%
Beto O'Rourke: 37%

**June 2018 PPP poll**
Ted Cruz: 48%
Beto: 42%

Difference: 2 points GAINED!
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9213f/3b1d797/7e87599e/35a856c0/2685562186/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180606-poll?refcode=ema180608-v1s1&amount=3")**
Beto is working tirelessly to hear from Texans across our state. He's not letting anything stop him. He's held hundreds of town halls and, as of this weekend, he'll have visited all 254 counties. He's using every single opportunity to reach and listen to those he wants to represent. **A campaign like this is unheard of these days -- grassroots, fully powered by people!**
But all of our momentum is up against Ted Cruz's special interests, super PACs and the Koch brothers spending millions attacking Beto. It's on all of us to step up and help Beto fight back. We've got to overpower all of that special interest money and make more gains in these polls.
**[Chip in a donation of $3 right now to Beto's people-powered campaign to take on Ted Cruz. We're counting on everyday Texans to make this campaign possible. ](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9213f/3b1d797/7e87599e/35a856c0/2685562186/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180606-poll?refcode=ema180608-v1s1&amount=3")**
We have five months until the election and not a day to spare. There will be more negative ads, more attacks, more super PACs. We have to give Beto the help he needs to power through all of it.
All of the doors we need to knock, all of the phones we need to call, all of the voters we need to register, all of the people we need to reach -- none of it can happen without us having Beto's back.
We're within single digits of Ted Cruz, the runner-up of the presidential primary and the poster child of special interest groups. We're gaining ground. **That's all because of you.** But single digits won't be good enough on Election Day. We have to WIN.
**[Help us keep moving those poll numbers in the right direction. Donate $3 right now to Beto's campaign.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9213f/3b1d797/7e87599e/35a856c0/2685562186/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180606-poll?refcode=ema180608-v1s1&amount=3")**
Thanks,
Team Beto
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9213f/3b1d797/7e87599e/35a856c0/2685562186/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180606-poll?refcode=ema180608-v1s1&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9213f/3b1d797/7e87599e/35a856c1/2685562186/VEsD/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you need to update your contact information, [ you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9213f/3b1d797/7e87599e/35a856c2/2685562186/VEsA/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9213f/3b1d797/7e87599e/35a856c3/2685562186/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Paul Davis
subject: Fight back: attacks on women’s healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OVsOjVPlVUB4kn8RHDIqyMABVzQb6V39uRXbJ0XJXSc=/yiA2ONJP3ANrdcSNhW9ghoLCXaAkAM_hgbkZIT5GCMw=?gpsid=11_36_1111&ms=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)
Dear Peter,

Since his first day in office, President Trump has threatened access to healthcare for millions of Americans -- and lately, his attacks on women's health have escalated. Access to reproductive care and family planning services are under attack, and it's up to us to fight back.

Access to family planning services and medications like birth control are indispensable for women. Often, doctors prescribe birth control to treat numerous health conditions, ranging from PCOS to pre-menopause. And overall, it strengthens economic security, saving women an estimated $1.4 billion a year.

**[Women should not be forced to ask for permission to access basic health services. Add your name now to stand up for women's healthcare.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OVsOjVPlVUB4kn8RHDIqyMABVzQb6V39uRXbJ0XJXSc=/yiA2ONJP3ANrdcSNhW9ghoLCXaAkAM_hgbkZIT5GCMw=?gpsid=11_36_1111&ms=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)**

From threatening the free birth control guaranteed under the Affordable Care Act to withholding federal family planning funds for low-income Americans, President Trump has made it clear that he won't fight on behalf of more than 55 million women who use birth control -- so it's up to all of us.

**[As we continue to address the challenges facing our healthcare system, I promise to protect women's healthcare and their access to birth control. Add your name and join me.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OVsOjVPlVUB4kn8RHDIqyMABVzQb6V39uRXbJ0XJXSc=/yiA2ONJP3ANrdcSNhW9ghoLCXaAkAM_hgbkZIT5GCMw=?gpsid=11_36_1111&ms=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180607_bcacce_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)**

Thank you,

Paul Davis

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

| | \----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Team - Leading up to Stacey's big win on May 22, we heard incredible stories from our Get-Out-The-Vote team. **[Here are some of our favorites:](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b13/2087022252/VEsE/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+Here+are+some+of+our+favorites&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS")**
> "Yesterday while canvassing, we talked to a young, undecided voter. After our conversation, he said because we knocked on his door to talk about the issues, he'd vote for Stacey Abrams. Knocking on doors MATTERS!" - _Madeleine and Lauren, Cobb County _
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b10/2087022252/VEsF/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS")
> "On primary election day, I was knocking doors in Smyrna, where I met Wanda. She told me that Stacey earned her vote because I was the first 'foot soldier' from any campaign to knock on her door. Wanda was impressed that I was out 'pounding the pavement in this hot, rainy weather,' and she said she loved Stacey's vision for Georgia." - _Melody, Atlanta _
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b11/2087022252/VEsC/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS") ********[Add your story: Join #TeamAbrams
to canvass this Saturday »](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b1e/2087022252/VEsD/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5+-+Add+your+story+Join+TeamAbramsnbsp%0A%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS")******** [**When we show up where people live, they show up at the ballot box.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b1f/2087022252/VEsA/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=6+-+When+we+show+up+where+people+live+they+s&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS") But to win in November, Team Abrams will need to reach out to _more than a million_ Georgia voters. It's a tall order - but if we all step up to share Stacey's vision with our friends and neighbors, we WILL turn Georgia blue. [**Want to help Stacey Abrams win? Join #TeamAbrams in Atlanta this Saturday:**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b1c/2087022252/VEsB/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=7+-+Want+to+help+Stacey+Abrams+win+Join+Team&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS") [**https://secure.staceyabrams.com/June-Days-of-Action**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b1d/2087022252/VEsO/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=8+-+httpssecurestaceyabramscomJuneDaysofActi&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS") [****](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b1a/2087022252/VEsP/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS") Behind every door is a Georgian who is counting on us to make sure Stacey Abrams is our next governor. [**Every story, every conversation, and, yes, every selfie from the doors puts Stacey Abrams one step closer to victory in November.**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b1b/2087022252/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=10+-+Every+story+every+conversation+and+yes+e&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS") That's why #TeamAbrams holds volunteer hours every week! Will you join us to knock doors and make calls for Stacey Abrams this Saturday? We're not kidding when we say we can't do this without you: [**https://secure.staceyabrams.com/June-Days-of-Action**](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b18/2087022252/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/s/team-abrams-atlanta-day-of-action-6-9?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=11+-+httpssecurestaceyabramscomJuneDaysofActi&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS") Turning Georgia blue won't be easy. But when we stand together for progress, we win. Thank you for standing with us! Team Abrams _P.S. Can't join us in person?**[Chip in $3 to support our voter outreach effort](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa49/34a064cc/885677d/70f3b19/2087022252/VEsHBw/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/building-momentum?refcode=IE060818DOORS&amount=3&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=12+-+Chip+in++asknbsp+to+support+our+voter+ou&utm_campaign=IE060818DOORS&source=IE060818DOORS").** _

name: Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
subject: Diaz-Balart sells out the Everglades
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ABUT2zU_0eZgD594JwW_0Mx2-jQAcedyWsGvpn-I26s=/XZXqMX_QviNh0GwyMC9EKKmhAn3dXzamATRRrFQpaVo=?refcode=june-8-RS-Diaz-Balart-is-harming-the-everglades)

Friend,
This is a perfect example of why I chose to step up and run for Congress.
**My opponent, incumbent Rep. Mario Diaz-Balart, just voted to allow more offshore drilling.**
With this vote, Congressman Diaz-Balart has made it abundantly clear: clean water, a safe environment, and the health of our communities are not his priorities whatsoever.
Of the four members on the House Appropriations Committee from Florida, Diaz-Balart was the only one to side with oil and gas companies -- once again selling out his own district.
**Sadly, we shouldn 't be surprised because we've seen this time and time again from Congressman Diaz-Balart:** FL-25 is home to an incredibly large swath of the Everglades, one of our most precious ecosystems. The individual who is elected to represent this natural treasure should understand the special responsibility they hold- Mario Diaz-Balart does not. For instance, less than two years ago in 2016 Congressman Diaz-Balart voted to create a pathway for offshore drilling all along Florida's panhandle and entire western coast!
Frank Matzner, from The National Resources Defense Council, said it best:
"Representative Diaz-Balart has passed up a chance to protect Americans from Trump's extreme offshore drilling plan, which he has said he opposes," remarked Franz Matzner, director of federal affairs for the NRDC.
"His vote instead helps pad oil industry profits, and abandons the beach communities who'll bear the risk of oil spills, along with every citizen who'll experience the effects of the extreme weather made worse by increasing carbon pollution."
No representative from Florida - Republican or Democrat - should ever risk our state's economy, environment, and wildlife to win favor from oil and gas industry lobbyists.
[**Help ensure I am elected so that I may serve as a protector of Florida 's coasts and our economy. Donate here to my campaign against Mario Diaz-Balart today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ABUT2zU_0eZgD594JwW_0Mx2-jQAcedyWsGvpn-I26s=/XZXqMX_QviNh0GwyMC9EKKmhAn3dXzamATRRrFQpaVo=?refcode=june-8-RS-Diaz-Balart-is-harming-the-everglades)
**\- Mary**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ABUT2zU_0eZgD594JwW_0Mx2-jQAcedyWsGvpn-I26s=/XZXqMX_QviNh0GwyMC9EKKmhAn3dXzamATRRrFQpaVo=?refcode=june-8-btn-RS-Diaz-Balart-is-harming-the-everglades)

Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Baffled by Betsy DeVos testimony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | Team,

Thank you to everyone who supported my campaign this week as we officially enter the general election season. I appreciate knowing you stand with me, which is why I wanted to share some troubling news that might interest you (and that we can address together).

Education Secretary Betsy DeVos testified this week that the school safety commission established after the Parkland school shooting will not be looking at gun violence as part of its work.

**[I’m baffled by her comments, and if you are too, I need your help to address this latest news.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/FQE/ni0YAA/t.2i5/S9jJIwCYR5O6DKwWtLfwow/h0/bEeBgxERNOKqKSSGfiLkf6sXtr65U-2FCOzn261v703e1PuUVBGqPundJQ7Cj8udITy-2FTV-2F0sEMYaXgNltuulB4gq7BN4lBdFQFWlDuVuwApghQ3bHDruugu0yfd3G70OfL77173d9-2Bjk8HQHtgVVCjTOIrMNy6pZWR7n3ofmDW0Zj4b2dLgYHB-2FccNjao2rm7vxxp4A6njxIo6XUA5KaKKseNSoiIEHDrcCbMPiUvGqEglMw7pxT5OeCbCuZl9wbwd4Lbf6XKB4isrZm9ra3BQAYqEHWMxayk8lxjv4OiRSY-3D)**

If we’re going to succeed in curbing the gun violence epidemic in the U.S., we have to be able to research it, discuss its role in society, and how we may stop future tragedies from happening.

DeVos’s comments are the latest example of some Republicans offering thoughts and prayers to devastated communities before claiming that we cannot do anything about these senseless deaths.

**[I disagree. That’s why I’m calling on DeVos to study the gun violence epidemic as part of her commission on school safety. Will you add your voice with mine and sign my petition today?](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/FQE/ni0YAA/t.2i5/S9jJIwCYR5O6DKwWtLfwow/h1/bEeBgxERNOKqKSSGfiLkf6sXtr65U-2FCOzn261v703e1PuUVBGqPundJQ7Cj8udITrPuf3PE-2B-2B3jvobr0O6UWNmf0wiJXG-2FYEyH3QiWNfLMx0Oo78CdOV-2B9rEFoMCL5K-2BCCt5FL0ohiejO-2F6XJ7Ac6AP1q1F3ZKMZ7FrP5oQ-2Bn-2Fn1Ig13j9isIh91A8FqCqaZCuV9xn1Z8y34iAc2jvurrBXF0NrfyWmu2R4oOz-2F2bneoFNRgPzAI-2BU7ykkVexGatrJA2cQbauTIAYr-2Fv-2BeJH5juvuf-2BJlWSWCxoFE7AbSK8-3D)**

How many more tragedies must we face before things change? How many more parents will get a text that their kids are hiding in a classroom? How many more communities will gun violence tear apart before Republicans act?

This commission could be the first step in finding a solution to stop the cycle of gun violence. We must be willing to take this first step if we are ever going to take meaningful action to save lives.

**[I need you to join me and call on DeVos to include gun violence prevention as part of her commission into school safety. Please add your name to the growing list of Americans demanding DeVos change her course immediately.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/FQE/ni0YAA/t.2i5/S9jJIwCYR5O6DKwWtLfwow/h2/bEeBgxERNOKqKSSGfiLkf6sXtr65U-2FCOzn261v703e1PuUVBGqPundJQ7Cj8udITtXP3OybDuHk1-2BE1huajHeIKEO0clJvkeBOwPTmXgIw6phVXhOPoSVUBHs4ITd5V81BVJ8g2-2ByfejDdiJ9QxFhc5qfbiaOKA-2BN-2FWPlf-2FEV9qhzUIRMZytcdSUg8WtHGUX1C5-2FQei6OytSQGRrUCA0lQwBVDe2oR8uCay3MnOcoqfV-2FtSwIVvbwVTO0woAP9Aczh8PiEExPFwrhy2-2FzpHS1aiXNqViKLb7ZdnqUjw89lA-3D)**

Thank you for standing with me,

Martin

---
Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Internet, interrupted
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | If you're reading this, you've accessed the Internet today. A recent report from Pew Research found that 77% of Americans access the Internet daily -- 26% report using it "constantly." And whether you use it to stream video, check the news, or post pictures of your newest culinary creations (like I do on Instagram at @CleanCookingCongresswoman), our Internet is about to be interrupted. **This is the last week for us to save net neutrality protections.** On June 11th, the Trump FCC will end net neutrality protections. The Senate passed a measure to overrule the FCC and keep those protections in place. **If the House doesn't get moving this week, it will be too late.** [**_Demand Speaker Ryan get moving to protect net neutrality now. Add your name._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f27/622b7b5b/1b0c1c66/307b81ca/108868669/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180607") Thank you. Debbie Wasserman Schultz

name: Jane Sanders, The Sanders Institute
subject: One Year Old!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Thank you for your support during the first year
#
Friend,
Thank you for your support during the first year of The Sanders Institute. We've had a strong and promising first year, and have exciting plans for innovation and successful initiatives for the future. We couldn't have gotten here without your help.
Can we count on your support as we continue to shift the framework of debate in a progressive direction and to provide bold, progressive solutions to economic, environmental, racial and social justice issues?

_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $10](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aac3/bed43eb/6940e527/75fdf193/2729268490/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180608-exp")
[Express Donate: $27](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aac3/bed43eb/6940e527/75fdf192/2729268490/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=em180608-exp")
[Express Donate: $50](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aac3/bed43eb/6940e527/75fdf19d/2729268490/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em180608-exp")
[Express Donate: $100](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aac3/bed43eb/6940e527/75fdf19c/2729268490/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em180608-exp")
[Express Donate: $250](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aac3/bed43eb/6940e527/75fdf19f/2729268490/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em180608-exp")
[Or, donate another amount](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aac3/bed43eb/6940e527/75fdf190/2729268490/VEsHDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180608-exp&noskip=true")
Since our launch in June of last year, the Institute and our Fellows have focused on issues too often ignored by the mainstream media.
A few examples:
* We collaborated with National Nurses United to write a paper on Medicare for All and delivered it to every member of Congress.
* We allied with 200 leading economists to warn about the short-term and long-term implications of the GOP tax plan.
* We began an in-depth interview series, with two innovative approaches - student debt forgiveness and a national jobs guarantee - discussed and backed up with research.
* We released a series of videos about the most glaring issues in our voting system and what individuals and organizations can do about them.
* We published countless op-eds, papers, fact sheets, and reports.
* We are currently working on another series focused on the climate crisis and are in the planning stages for one on criminal justice reform.

We have many initiatives lined up for our second year and the future. We need your support to make them a reality.
Thank you for staying engaged,
Jane Sanders
Founder and Fellow of The Sanders Institute

We've had a strong and promising first year, and have exciting plans for innovation and successful initiatives for the future. We couldn't have gotten here without your help. Can we count on your support as we continue to shift the framework of debate in a progressive direction and to provide bold, progressive solutions to economic, environmental, racial and social justice issues? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Since our launch in June of last year, the Institute and our Fellows have focused on issues too often ignored by the mainstream media. A few examples: We collaborated with National Nurses United to write a paper on Medicare for All and delivered it to every member of Congress. We allied with 200 leading economists to warn about the short-term and long-term implications of the GOP tax plan. We began an in-depth interview series, with two innovative approaches - student debt forgiveness and a national jobs guarantee - discussed and backed up with research. We released a series of videos about the most glaring issues in our voting system and what individuals and organizations can do about them. We published countless op-eds, papers, fact sheets, and reports. We are currently working on another series focused on the climate crisis and are in the planning stages for one on criminal justice reform. We have many initiatives lined up for our second year and the future. We need your support to make them a reality. subject: Kellyanne Conway says attacks on Joe coming...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
President Trump's top advisor Kellyanne Conway said President Trump plans to ramp up his attacks on Democrats in red states as the midterms get closer... and she named Joe specifically! |
---

| | **_"[KELLYANNE] CONWAY: TRUMP TO TARGET RED-STATE DEMS LIKE DONNELLY"_**
\-- _Roll Call_ , 6/6/18 | **[**HELP JOE FIGHT BACK!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21b3/7377f838/3c33482b/51f9016e/2584711222/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyanne-attacks?refcode=20180608nd&amount=25")**
---
Peter -- this week, President Trump's top advisor Kellyanne Conway said President Trump plans to ramp up his attacks on Democrats in red states as the midterms get closer... _and she named Joe specifically!_

Why is President Trump going after Joe? **Because he wants to replace Joe with Rep. Braun, who will rubber stamp the Trump-McConnell-Koch agenda, no questions asked!**

What does that agenda look like?
* More tax cuts for super-wealthy campaign donors on the backs of working Hoosiers
* Huge cuts to Medicare, Social Security, and HIP 2.0
* Pretty much anything President Trump and his allies want!

Joe is no one's rubber stamp. He always takes the time to carefully consider what's best for Hoosiers. But for Joe to take on people like President Trump, Karl Rove, and the Kochs, he needs this grassroots team to step up.

**And in the face of President Donald Trump 's attacks, we've never needed you more. Will you pitch in to help Joe fend off his attacks and BEAT Rep. Braun on Election Day?**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: An "in-tents" note about why I love summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, with summer right around the corner, I wanted to share a quick note from the actual (non-campaign) trail about how great the "great outdoors" really is. [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13fb/3e0906/65bf9144/3e343f16/3612058577/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&source=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping") It's no secret that I love the outdoors. Whether it's fishing, canoeing, camping, or hiking, I'll take any reason to get some fresh air.

Thankfully, this seems to run in the family.

Anne and I have always loved camping, and I'm proud to say we've passed that love on to our kids. All three of our children were in tents before they were 6 months old!

**Some of my favorite family memories come from our annual camping trips to Douthat State Park.** [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13fb/3e0906/65bf9144/3e343f15/3612058577/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&source=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping") For me, there's no better way to spend a summer day than exploring nature on an early morning hike - and there's no better way to spend a summer night than sleeping under the stars.

One of the reasons I love being outdoors so much is because it allows you to experience a different kind of beauty than we're used to. It's an infinite beauty - not the 2-D kind of thing you experience on a TV screen or computer, but the four dimensional beauty of real creation. And I think we could all use a little more beauty in our lives right now.

So, if you're still looking for summer plans (besides volunteering, of course), here's my advice: **Find your local state or national park and discover that beauty for yourself. Trust me, you 'll be glad you did.** [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13fb/3e0906/65bf9144/3e343f14/3612058577/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&source=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping") Hope you have a great summer,

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13fb/3e0906/65bf9144/3e343f6b/3612058577/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&source=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping")
---

---

|

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13fb/3e0906/65bf9144/3e343f6c/3612058577/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&source=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13fb/3e0906/65bf9144/3e343f63/3612058577/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping&source=20180608_1_NEWS_TK_Camping") Thanks for having Tim's back!

name: Jacky
subject: it's not a secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Everyone - I need your help.
It's no secret that Mitch McConnell and GOP mega-donors are desperate to keep Dean Heller in the Senate. In fact, a Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC has already pledged millions of dollars to keep Nevada red. They know that our race is tied, and Nevada is one of just two seats we need to flip to turn the Senate blue.
So this fight won't be easy, and we can't fall behind with this much at stake. But we're still $15,000 short of our must-hit match goal. If you step up and donate, **a group of supporters will match your donation. **

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Peter - Will you help us get on the ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We're building a movement that will sweep the rot of corruption out of Albany and carry the voices of the people in.
#
We need your help to build our grassroots movement, Peter. We're building a movement that will sweep the rot of corruption out of Albany and carry the voices of the people in.
As you know, the first big task for this campaign is to organize and petition to get on the ballot. It requires gathering thousands of signatures from folks across the state, and we started that effort this week.
A number of people across New York have already committed to take action. But we can do even more with your help.
**[Peter - Can we count on you to step up and volunteer? Add your name now to commit to gathering petitions. We'll be in touch soon to help you get started.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e18/6e822e2f/1b72f8f4/41721798/33339326/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/petition-volunteer?source=em180608-full")**
As Attorney General, Zephyr will be an independent fighter for the people. She will help usher in a new era of politics in New York, an era that leaves behind the corruption that is poisoning our government.
We've made tremendous progress so far, and that's thanks to people like you stepping up to own a piece of this campaign. But to reach our goal, we need all hands on deck.
So please, sign up today to start petitioning with us:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/petition-volunteer](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e18/6e822e2f/1b72f8f4/41721798/33339326/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/petition-volunteer?source=em180608-full")**
Thank you for everything you to do build a brighter future for New York. Together, we are going to win.
All our best,
Adin and Aly
Team Teachout
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e18/6e822e2f/1b72f8f4/41721798/33339326/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/petition-volunteer?source=em180608-full")

* * *

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The Paris climate accord & you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Add your name: We need 100,000 people to demand climate justice.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79212/2f5ea88d/70fa1805/2cbcf49e/1960507285/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja") Friend, The U.S. could lead the world in the fight against climate change. But now, thanks to President Trump's withdrawal from the Paris Agreement in June of last year, we are the ONLY country in the world not committed to stopping climate change. You and I know it: Since Trump took office, he's been a disaster for the environment. In the face of scientific facts (which he doesn't believe), he's rolled back clean air and water regulations, diminished the power of the EPA, and threatened our public lands. In the year since Trump announced that he would withdraw the United States from the Paris climate agreement, he's been leading a one-man band of climate denial toward global disaster. [**Join me and progressive leaders across the country to demand climate action: Tell Trump to honor our obligation to the Paris climate accord!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79212/2f5ea88d/70fa1805/2cbcf49e/1960507285/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja") | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79212/2f5ea88d/70fa1805/2cbcf49e/1960507285/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja")
---
Trump's anti-science agenda jeopardizes our health and safety. But his absolute failure has allowed Democratic governors to step forward and lead on climate change. We've stepped into the vacuum of leadership left behind by Washington D.C., and we're making a huge difference.
Expanding clean energy jobs is one of the reasons numerous new outlets like CNBC have named Washington state the top economy in the nation -- and we're not alone. The president can't stop me or Democratic governors in California or Minnesota; he can't stop governors in New York or Hawaii. We're moving forward with or without him.
But if we're going to really address climate change, we need to act as one planet. We must raise our voices together and demand change -- before it's too late.
[**Right now, we need 100,000 people to sign our petition to demand climate justice. Together, we can make a difference. Will you add your name?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79212/2f5ea88d/70fa1805/2cbcf49e/1960507285/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja")
[SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79212/2f5ea88d/70fa1805/2cbcf49e/1960507285/VEsD/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Finslee-paris-ja")
---
When progressives stand united, nothing can stop us.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79212/2f5ea88d/70fa1805/2cbcf49d/1960507285/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---

PO Box 21067, Seattle, WA 98111

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: Mitch McConnell's latest attempt to cling to the Senate majority

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4632/24c69fd9/1a8087c6b/18814838/1007751332/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact&source=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact")
---

Peter,

Mitch McConnell is desperate to hold on to the Republican majority in the Senate.

So desperate that this week he canceled the Senate's August recess.

McConnell might offer excuses for why he did this, but we know the real reason: to protect Republicans' majority by making it harder for Democrats to go home and campaign.

That's why our Senate candidates need us more than ever -- to overcome underhanded Republican attacks like these.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women overcome McConnell's latest tricks and flip the Senate.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4632/24c69fd9/1a8087c6b/18814839/1007751332/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180608_email_AugustRecess?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact&source=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact")**

Republicans are clearly making the Senate their top priority.

And they're feeling good about their odds. They only have to protect one senator running in a state Hillary Clinton won. Democrats have to defend 10 seats in states that Trump won.

That's why we need to ramp up our efforts to re-elect our 10 Senate women -- including three who are in those states Trump won -- and add Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ) to their ranks to take back the majority.

**Donate $3 to help protect and elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Protect-and-Elect-Senate-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4632/24c69fd9/1a8087c6b/1881483a/1007751332/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180608_email_AugustRecess?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgProtectandElectS&utm_campaign=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact&source=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4632/24c69fd9/1a8087c6b/1881483b/1007751332/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180608_email_AugustRecess?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact&source=WQEFER22N_digital_email_20180608_AugustRecess_inact")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: What It's All About
body:
As Hoosier Republicans, together we hold a covenant of trust with voters. As a party, they've entrusted us with an important responsibility. We... | | |
---
| |
---
| **_What It's All About_** As Hoosier Republicans, together we hold a covenant of trust with voters. As a party, they've entrusted us with an important responsibility. We govern our state. We lead many of our communities. We serve all Hoosiers.

And with that trust and responsibility, our party has delivered. Today, thanks to Republican leadership, Indiana is the fiscal envy of the nation. We've got record numbers of new job commitments. We've got balanced budgets. We've got the nation's only fully-funded infrastructure plan with record road investments.

Under Republican leadership, we've taken Indiana from a middle-of-the-pack state in almost every category to a top-ranked state for business, economic outlook, government efficiency and so much more.

And this weekend, Hoosier Republicans from across the state will come together. Many of you are already here in Evansville for the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention, and many more of you will be coming down tomorrow.

We'll spend this weekend celebrating the achievements we've earned for Indiana, and the great government service that is our mission.

But we'll also look ahead. We'll look to November, when another round of critical elections will determine the future of our state. But we'll also look to the future of our party, and how we'll continue to elect more Republican in the years ahead, making sure our state remains on the right track not just now, but for generations to come.

That's a charge that I take personally, and that I share with each of you. And it's going to take the full Republican team to make it happen.

Stop me this weekend, and say hello. We've got a great Republican _party_ planned, and I can't wait to share it with each of you.

-Kyle Hupfer
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_Supporting Our Next Generation of Hoosiers_** Last weekend, Governor Eric Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb hosted more than a hundred [Boy Scouts](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9c605e3912&e=1acd9bb3d6)**** for the Governor’s Campout!

The Governor’s Residence was turned into a campground filled with food, games, and fun! The scouts participated in many activities with the help of the [Indiana Guardsman](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8cd57ba847&e=1acd9bb3d6) and other groups. [IndyHumane](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a316891c36&e=1acd9bb3d6) even joined them Sunday for a service project making toys for IndyHumane’s dogs and cats, with special help from First Dog Henry Holcomb!

Check out some [highlights](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=066460076f&e=1acd9bb3d6) from the weekend!
---
|
---
| | **_Mike Braun Corner_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=02779cae65&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**First General Election****Commercial**** Hits the Airwaves**_
This week, U.S. Senate nominee Mike Braun released [his first TV advertisement of the general election](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6c5845ddea&e=1acd9bb3d6) campaign. The ad is called "Here At Home," and it highlights how employees at his company are like family.

Braun's company, based in his hometown of Jasper, Indiana, employs more than 800 employees across the country -- with a starting salary that's nearly double the minimum wage.

Unlike Democrat Joe Donnelly, Mike Braun is a job creator...and after he wins in November (with your help!), he'll take a Hoosier message of job creation and economic growth to Washington!

Watch the ad [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=68a7f8b16a&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_2018 Statewide Team on Tour_**
This weekend at the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention, we’ll [nominate our statewide team](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ea35edd9e&e=1acd9bb3d6) of Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Treasurer Kelly Mitchell and Auditor Tera Klutz.

Leading up to the big event in Evansville, this historic all-female statewide ticket went on tour across the state, meeting with delegates and Hoosier Republicans.

These three public servants are working hard for us daily...whether that’s by protecting the security of our elections, helping more Hoosiers save for college, or promoting transparency in government! If you see Connie, Kelly or Tera this weekend, please stop them and say thank you for the great work they’re doing!

Let’s do all we can to help them each get across the finish line in November!
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_ **Governor Eric Holcomb**[ceremonially signs anti-bullying law](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9076b87d09&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** [announces the 21 Golden Hoosiers Award winners](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5bbbd14e45&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Treasurer Kelly Mitchell and Auditor Tera Klutz** [go on a statewide tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ceada48a4e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Superintendent of Public Instruction Jennifer McCormick** [participated in a discussion with educators](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab6894f683&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** [is working to help fight the opioid epidemic](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d9f241fbbb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[introduces judicial nominees](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=277429afd7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [discussed rolling back burdensome regulations](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7d40b50c62&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita** [supports new opioid initiative campaign released by the the White House](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=60ef289737&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks** [is leading public health emergency preparedness efforts](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bb391b3d44&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Luke Messer**[wished a happy birthday to Vice President Pence](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ae756956c6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Buchson** [voted in support of government spending cuts](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=868ba6e6db&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[stands in support of Hoosier truck drivers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=172f18916d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JUNE 8th**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
Dear Derek,

Last night a group of dedicated Republican leaders met to work on recruiting candidates for the 2018 election cycle. I am humbled and grateful to them and other Republicans who continue to step up and do the hard work required to move our party forward.

As I looked around the room, what I saw were people who don’t always see eye-to-eye on the issues. One thing I believe they all agree on is that Republicans need to hold our majorities in order to continue the successes we’ve seen in the last session. And, these folks were willing to put aside their differences to work together to identify and recruit Republicans.

Our Republican activists, county and city chairmen, Area Vice Chairs, state committee members, delegates, and yes, even our legislators are not motivated by money, they are motivated to make a difference.

It was outrageous and insulting that Democrat Minority Leader Jeff Woodburn would say that the $200 “paycheck” that legislators receive for their service should be held till the end of their term to assure they are held accountable for their service. Really? How disrespectful to every volunteer legislator in New Hampshire - Republican or Democrat.
As we close this week out and the deadline (June 15) nears to file to run for office, thank you to all those who’ve stepped up to serve. And for those of you who may be on the fence, please jump off and run!
**WE NEED YOUR VOICES IN CONCORD!**

You can be sure that if the Democrats take control, Constitutional Carry, the business tax cuts, and reducing regulations will be among their priorities to reverse next year.
A sincere and heartfelt thanks to Spec Bowers, Sandy Geisler, Rep. Barbara Griffin, Rep. Dick Hinch, Bill O’Brien, Frank Sapareto, Steve Stepanek, Fran Wendelboe, Merav Yaakov, and NHGOP Vice Chair Wayne MacDonald for taking the time and making the effort to fill the Republican slate for 2018!

Sincerely,

Jeanie

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT**
Our Republican Spotlight this week is Jim Morgan! Jim serves as the Chair of the Derry Town Council and as our NHGOP Finance Chair! He started as Finance Chair in March, and has led a great Finance Committee since, and has been busy developing new ways of raising money for our party. Thank you for all the hard work, Jim!
