clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JUNE 8th | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, Last night a group of dedicated Republican leaders met to work on recruiting candidates for the 2018 election cycle. I am humbled and grateful to them and other Republicans who continue to step up and do the hard work required to move our party forward. As I looked around the room, what I saw were people who don’t always see eye-to-eye on the issues. One thing I believe they all agree on is that Republicans need to hold our majorities in order to continue the successes we’ve seen in the last session. And, these folks were willing to put aside their differences to work together to identify and recruit Republicans. Our Republican activists, county and city chairmen, Area Vice Chairs, state committee members, delegates, and yes, even our legislators are not motivated by money, they are motivated to make a difference. It was outrageous and insulting that Democrat Minority Leader Jeff Woodburn would say that the $200 “paycheck” that legislators receive for their service should be held till the end of their term to assure they are held accountable for their service. Really? How disrespectful to every volunteer legislator in New Hampshire - Republican or Democrat. As we close this week out and the deadline (June 15) nears to file to run for office, thank you to all those who’ve stepped up to serve. And for those of you who may be on the fence, please jump off and run! WE NEED YOUR VOICES IN CONCORD! You can be sure that if the Democrats take control, Constitutional Carry, the business tax cuts, and reducing regulations will be among their priorities to reverse next year. A sincere and heartfelt thanks to Spec Bowers, Sandy Geisler, Rep. Barbara Griffin, Rep. Dick Hinch, Bill O’Brien, Frank Sapareto, Steve Stepanek, Fran Wendelboe, Merav Yaakov, and NHGOP Vice Chair Wayne MacDonald for taking the time and making the effort to fill the Republican slate for 2018! Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHTS UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK The NH House GOP softball team taking a picture before their decisive victory this past Wednesday - their second win in a row! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week is Jim Morgan! Jim serves as the Chair of the Derry Town Council and as our NHGOP Finance Chair! He started as Finance Chair in March, and has led a great Finance Committee since, and has been busy developing new ways of raising money for our party. Thank you for all the hard work, Jim! TWEET** OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Angry. Enraged. Upset.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I'm having trouble deciding on the right word for how I feel about irresponsible Washington politicians latest effort to gut protections for pre-existing conditions. Last night, we learned that politicians are trying again to eliminate health care protections for people with pre-existing conditions. This time, they are using the courts. To my family and me, the issue of health care is personal. I have a daughter with a pre-existing condition, and as I've traveled across this district and told her story, I've been overwhelmed by the number of people who share with me their own challenges of dealing with health care and pre-existing conditions. I remember when she was diagnosed. It was one of the most trying times of our lives. And we were lucky -- we had insurance that covered the bulk of her medical expenses. North Carolinians and people across the country are tired of typical, partisan politicians like Congressman Budd, who voted against protections for those with pre-existing conditions -- siding with his special interest campaign contributors over hardworking families. I'm angry because, once again, Washington is playing political games with people's health. But I'm also **fired up.** This is part of the reason I decided to run for Congress -- so I can protect the affordable coverage so many North Carolina families rely on. As a Representative in Congress, I will always put North Carolinians and their best interest first. **I need you to step up today.[_Let Washington know that you support the protections for people with pre-existing conditions and are ready to hold them accountable for ripping away people's health security. Add your name to mine._](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427871/e3b7d3/5cb31538/2555d0d7/2956221433/VEsH/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180608")** Election Day is our chance to hold politicians in Washington accountable. They need to know we are paying attention. We are active and organized. And we will fight to protect health care. [**_Let them know you're fired up, too. Add your name to support protections for people with pre-existing conditions._**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427871/e3b7d3/5cb31538/2555d0d7/2956221433/VEsE/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180608") Thank you. Kathy Manning
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427871/e3b7d3/5cb31538/2555d0d6/2956221433/VEsF/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427871/e3b7d3/5cb31538/2555d0d5/2956221433/VEsC/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")
